Class MediaService

java.lang.Object
martin.viewtool.core.MediaService
public class MediaService extends Object
Manages the in-memory list of network media and provides utilities for resolving local file paths and combining local and network media lists.
Author:
cesar

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    MediaService()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addNewMediaNetwork(List<MediaSyncPolling.Media> newMedia)
    Adds new media from the network to the in-memory list, skipping duplicates by ID.
    List<MediaSyncPolling.Media>
    createMediaListCombined()
    Builds a combined list of network media plus any local-only files not present on the network.
    List<MediaSyncPolling.Media>
    filterMedia(String textField, List<MediaSyncPolling.Media> listMedia)
    Filters a media list by file name.
    Path
    getDownloadBaseDir()
    Returns the base download directory, creating it if it does not exist.
    File
    getLocalFile(MediaSyncPolling.Media media)
    Resolves the expected local File for the given media.
    List<MediaSyncPolling.Media>
    getNetworkMediaAll()
    Returns a copy of all network media loaded.

  • Constructor Details

    • MediaService

      public MediaService()

  • Method Details

    • getNetworkMediaAll

      public List<MediaSyncPolling.Media> getNetworkMediaAll()
      Returns a copy of all network media loaded.
      Returns:
      list of network Media objects

    • getDownloadBaseDir

      public Path getDownloadBaseDir()
      Returns the base download directory, creating it if it does not exist. Defaults to ~/ViewToolDownloads.
      Returns:
      path to the download directory

    • getLocalFile

      public File getLocalFile(MediaSyncPolling.Media media)
      Resolves the expected local File for the given media.
      Parameters:
      media - the media whose local path is needed
      Returns:
      file object pointing to the local copy

    • addNewMediaNetwork

      public void addNewMediaNetwork(List<MediaSyncPolling.Media> newMedia)
      Adds new media from the network to the in-memory list, skipping duplicates by ID.
      Parameters:
      newMedia - list of media received from the API

    • createMediaListCombined

      public List<MediaSyncPolling.Media> createMediaListCombined()
      Builds a combined list of network media plus any local-only files not present on the network. Local-only entries are created with id=0 and userId=-1.
      Returns:
      combined media list

    • filterMedia

      public List<MediaSyncPolling.Media> filterMedia(String textField, List<MediaSyncPolling.Media> listMedia)
      Filters a media list by file name.
      Parameters:
      textField - search text entered by the user
      listMedia - source list to filter
      Returns:
      filtered list containing only items whose file name contains the search text
